raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":1.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.7":"The delegation directly asks to check citations, making reference accuracy, attribution, and scholarship coverage the load-bearing responsibility.","RX.1":"Citation checking requires disclosing uncertainty where source details or bibliographic claims cannot be verified from the artifact alone.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid expanding the task into claims about novelty, method quality, or experimental validity beyond citation-related issues.","RX.3":"The responsibility must stay limited to citation checking rather than rewriting or evaluating the paper more broadly.","RX.4":"Incorrect citation judgments could misattribute work or distort scholarly credit, so harm avoidance remains active.","RX.5":"Checking citations depends on traceable links between textual claims, named sources, and bibliographic provenance."}}

rationale.R1.7: The delegation directly asks to check citations, making reference accuracy, attribution, and scholarship coverage the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Citation checking requires disclosing uncertainty where source details or bibliographic claims cannot be verified from the artifact alone.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid expanding the task into claims about novelty, method quality, or experimental validity beyond citation-related issues.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility must stay limited to citation checking rather than rewriting or evaluating the paper more broadly.
rationale.RX.4: Incorrect citation judgments could misattribute work or distort scholarly credit, so harm avoidance remains active.
rationale.RX.5: Checking citations depends on traceable links between textual claims, named sources, and bibliographic provenance.
